Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discovery Of Deft Mario Salvador Cuellar'S Financial Condition
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gregory Wood, Esq., for defendant and opposing party Mario Cuellar
Stephen Liberatore, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Noemi Del Carmen Cuellar

No other appearance was stated. HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Noemi Mena's motion to compel discovery of defendant's financial condition is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition brief filed on behalf of both defendants.
MODIFICATION: Parties to prepare a protective order limiting disclosure of information to only counsel for the parties. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-02-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-13-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 602
